programme.title: Movie: Faith Under Fire
programme.desc: On the day that Antoinette Tuff considered suicide; she realized that all of her challenges had prepared her for a purpose; to save an Atlanta school under siege from a deranged killer bent on murdering the students.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Family Annihilator
programme.desc: After being turned down for a promotion, Brad Bishop used a sledgehammer to brutally murder his wife, his three young sons and his own mother. Although there have been multiple sightings, Brad Bishop has evaded the authorities for over 30 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Don't Care
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Jake Nodar and Melissa Miller take on a punishing Florida swamp teeming with poisonous snakes and aggressive alligators. When one of the survivalists becomes disoriented local authorities are called in to conduct an all-out search.

programme.title: Naked and Frozen: Welcome to the Tundra

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Feel the Burn
programme.desc: Dropped into Guyana's scorching savannah, two Naked and Afraid superfans battle the oppressive heat and relentless insect attacks. Scorching temperatures lead to severe dehydration and force a desperate fan to risk illness by drinking unsanitary fluids.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Stalked on the Savannah
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Two survivalists fight the heat in Central Brazil's sandstone desert while protecting themselves from vicious wasps, jaguars and rattlesnakes.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Edge of Madness
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the hellish conditions of Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed from day one by the heat, they battle debilitating health issues, a team dynamic breakdown, critical survival malfunctions and a massive psychological decline.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure: Into the Storm
programme.desc: Darrell and the team have to deal with a storm as they discover gold ore in an old wreck.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure: Striking Gold
programme.desc: The team discovers ornate artifacts that indicate the location of a 16th century captain's quarters.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Gold Strike
programme.desc: The crew cleans up and does a final gold weigh-in for the season. Then Dustin leads them to a new mine site he's had his eye on that proves instantly to have massive gold potential.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to the Future
programme.desc: An extended sneak peek of the all-new season of Gold Rush reveals a crisis in the Klondike forcing the miners in new directions. We go back to the beginning, nine years ago, revealing the pivotal moments that got each man to the crossroads they now face.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: BattleBots: Live to Die Another Day
programme.desc: When a surprising twist blows the competition wide open, the world's greatest bots redouble their efforts to win a spot in the knockout round.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: True Colors
programme.desc: Rebecca learns the results of Zied's background check. Avery delivers some devastating news to her mom. Benjamin finally meets Akinyi's father. Angela and Michael try to make amends. Darcey and Tom's relationship takes an interesting turn in Albania.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: The Quints Get Schooled

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Kelly/ Lauren
programme.desc: Kelly's history of miscarriages keeps her from telling her mom. Lauren is afraid of her father's explosive reaction.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Carmen/ Jerline

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Blackout, Bleedout
programme.desc: Two fishermen get stuck on the same lure; a cheerleader with a sprained finger nearly dies of an unexpected cause; and a power outage in the hospital foils the ER team's effort to get a dying patient to the O.R.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Never Say Die
programme.desc: A doctor struggles with the decision to revive an older patient after prolonged CPR. Two nurses encounter a stabbing victim on the street and try to save him. A doctor on a cruise ship finds that her dream job has become a nightmare.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper

programme.title: River Monsters: Jungle Terminator

programme.title: River Monsters: Jurassic-Sized Prehistoric Terror

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: River of the Dammed
programme.desc: Dropped by helicopter into the Macal River, Steve researches the morelet crocodile.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fluffy Pups and Tater Tots
programme.desc: A Chesapeake Bay retriever is convinced he's the alpha dog, but his big cousin isn't about to roll over. Miniature poodle Tater Tot is determined to prove she's the equal of her bigger, louder brothers. A snowy, fussy Samoyed befriends a Dalmation.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Pee Battle
programme.desc: A mother daughter duo’s lovable cats are having a territorial pissing match that's destroying not only their furniture but also their relationship. The cat daddy connects with cat from heaven, Ziggy, who has CPR skills.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Critical Condition
programme.desc: At Animal House, Dee sees a Chihuahua with a life-threatening condition, a vocal Macaw that needs a beak trim and a dangerously ill newborn calf. At home, Dr. Dee and her husband Ken welcome seven fainting goats to the family.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Blown Away
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team help a dog lost during a windstorm. Dr. Baier treats a small bird with a big personality. When a paralyzed dog is abandoned, Susan comes to the rescue. And the team head out to help an alligator injured in a fight.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Fledgling Penguins
programme.desc: It's graduation day for the fledgling penguins that have spent six months in their nursery being cared for by the keepers.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Southern Dogs in the City
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to participate in Dog Bowl, creating a chance for a handful of dogs to steal the spotlight. M2 helps a neglected dog left in horrible conditions. And a couple takes the first step towards becoming parents - adopting a Villalobos dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last of the Mobsters
programme.desc: Tia and her kids race to rescue a stray dog near a dangerous, busy highway. An adoption requires some temperament testing in an 18-wheel truck when a trucker wants to adopt a dog to join him on the road. And, a return adopter seeks out a senior dog.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy
programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: Movie: House Party
programme.desc: Despite his father's wishes, an urban teenager schemes to attend his friend's party.

programme.desc: Meghan Verikas had been attracted to Leon Jacob, in part, because as a doctor he saved lives. Now police officers were telling her he was trying to hire a hitman, potentially to take hers. But authorities had a plan of their own.

programme.desc: 50-year-old Edwardyne Williams' body is discovered in the woods and at first it appears to be a random act of violence. But as police dig deeper, they discover that the killer is someone who has been harboring a grudge against her for years.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Murder On The Home Front
programme.desc: When 25 year old veteran Brandon Horst is found with a bullet through his head, it looks like the fallen hero has succumbed to PTSD. But when the case is revealed to be a homicide, police must untangle a vicious conspiracy that hits close to home.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: The Girl in the Window
programme.desc: Lisa Bradford lives a quiet, country life in Arkansas with her husband Dennis and their two young kids. Their love story takes a devastating turn when they get a visit from police, unveiling a double life of crime so heinous it rips the marriage apart.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Only Two Remain
programme.desc: A husband is bludgeoned to death in his home. His wife and father-in-law claim it was self-defense. But when investigators take a closer at the crime scene, the story of what really happened that night will be put into question.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Presents: Homicide: Texas Killing Fields
programme.desc: When Laura Miller vanishes, police locate her remains along a Texas highway where over two dozen other young women have also turned up dead for over three decades.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Figure in the Shadows
programme.desc: A shocking crime jolts a small town when a young woman disappears and is later found dead. The last person seen with her-- a mysterious figure in camouflage. Investigators focus on several suspects, and one is convicted.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Curse of Dismal Creek
programme.desc: Sean Farmer travels to a remote campsite in Virginia for a fishing trip with his friend Scott Johnston. When a mysterious stranger appears, the area's dark past returns to haunt the campers.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Stranger on the Hill
programme.desc: For college sweethearts Ashley Freeman and Mike Grinnan, a late-night drive to a secluded Texas hill leads to a night of terror and a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A Killer in the Swamp
programme.desc: A young woman relocates to the marshes of the Ocala National Forest in Florida in search of some peace and a fresh start, but what once appeared to be a remote paradise, soon shows its true colors.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run From the Scene
programme.desc: On November 23, 2012, Pennsylvania DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store Pointing directly at the crime scene.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Pablo Escobar: Narco King
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. But he met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Mafia vs. KKK
programme.desc: The amazing story of the hidden war between two of the United States most violent groups, the mafia and the Ku Klux Klan.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia vs. KKK
programme.desc: The amazing story of the hidden war between two of the United States most violent groups, the mafia and the Ku Klux Klan.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska Range
programme.desc: Ana and Jacob White, leading furniture DIY-ers with thousands of social media followers, build their dream cabin in the remote Alaskan interior on Paxson Lake.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaskan Glacier
programme.desc: Alaskan adventure guide Don Lee is building a remote survival cabin on top of a glacier where no man has stepped before. But in an area plagued with avalanches and unpredictable weather, this fearless bushman needs to time his construction perfectly.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Honey Bucket
programme.desc: Nick races to finish his cabin before his mom visits again. Bears are still a threat, so Nick makes sure the electric fence is working. Nick and Kent design and build a "honey bucket," also known as an Alaskan toilet.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Nick's dad, Paul, returns to help put the finishing touches on the cabin. Brannon's team builds countertops and railings for the cabin, and his client arrives. Jere and Ben put in hard work finishing the new Sea Otter Sound Lodge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: By the Sea
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore. Whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right
programme.desc: America's best delicatessens are serving everything from perfected tried-and-true classics to inventive new spins on old favourites. Wolfgang Puck shares the best hot smoked salmon in the country.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Saint Paul, MN
programme.desc: Casey's latest delicious detour brings him to Saint Paul for an indoor food truck park, a timeless diner and a terrible twosome of crepes and Thai rolled ice cream.

programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Modern Family: Baby on Board
programme.desc: Gloria accompanies Cam and Mitch as a translator for their newest adoption. Jay and Manny bring Lily to her dance recital, while Claire and Phil have a proud parenting moment when they send Alex off to her first prom.

programme.desc: Dede's husband, Jerry, comes to town to bequeath her possessions to the family. Mitch and Claire receive a little more of Dede than they really know what to do with, Jay and Gloria feel sorry for Jerry and invite him to stay with them while he is in town.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Moving Day
programme.desc: Claire and Phil aren't convinced that Haley and Dylan can make it on their own as they move them into their new apartment before the baby arrives. Meanwhile, Pameron gets out of prison early and has a bone to pick with Mitchell.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blasts From the Past

programme.title: Bones: The Plain in the Prodigy

programme.title: Bones: The Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth investigate human remains found at a neighbourhood block party. Suburban politics and secret scandals give each neighbour in the cul-de-sac a motive, leaving Brennan, Booth and Sweets to sift through the drama to find their suspect.

programme.title: Bones: A Night at the Bones Museum
programme.desc: Brennan and Booth are called to investigate what appears to be charred human remains on an electrical fence. The mysterious corpse is later determined to be a mummified Egyptian royal, but the mystery deepens when a curator is murdered.

programme.title: Movie: Suicide Squad
programme.desc: A government official puts together a team of psychotic and evil supervillains to undertake dangerous suicide missions in return for clemency. Led by Rick Flagg and Deadshot, this 'suicide squad' attempts to save the world and have fun doing it.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of District Attorney Harvey Dent and Lieutenant James Gordon, Batman battles a madman known as the Joker who causes terror and mayhem for fun.

programme.title: Arrow: The Magician
programme.desc: A furious Nyssa confronts Oliver about Sara, when Oliver learns Malcolm Merlyn is alive, he suspects Merlyn killed Sara. Oliver and Nyssa join forces to go after the Dark Archer, intent on bringing Sara's killer to justice.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Return of the King
programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to partner with Pride and his team in the search for a missing homeland security theoretical terror playbook.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: While investigating a deadly accident at a naval base, the NCIS team finds out a unit of Seabees was poisoned with a contagious supervirus. Also, during an autopsy, Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live if an antidote can't be found.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek the Third

programme.desc: Justin surprises the team with the news that he already bought a zombie house that he wants them to flip, a small, single-story home that should take only a few weeks to remodel.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: A small house on a big lot has the team seeing dollar signs, with plans to split the property and build not one, but two houses for an epic payday. When the split goes bust - taking their profits with it.

programme.title: Live Rescue
programme.desc: Firefighters, paramedics and EMTs across the country bravely put their lives on the line responding to emergency calls.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Training Day
programme.desc: What does Joe do every morning before work? And where was Q employed before becoming a fireman?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Welcome to Miami
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: Timing is everything in comedy. The contestants test their comedy on unsuspecting strangers; teach office staff about proper safety techniques and test their luck with online dating profiles.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Virtual Insanity
programme.desc: The guys bark up the wrong tree at a pet store, and tonight’s big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he’s never visited before.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Ava
programme.desc: Terry leaves Jake in charge of entertaining his pregnant wife, Sharon, while he and Rosa head to Rikers to learn more about the Douglass Street murders. But when Sharon's water breaks sooner than expected, crisis ensues at the precinct.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Swedes
programme.desc: In an attempt to solve an international case, Jake and Rosa are forced to work with a pair of Swedish cops and things get very competitive very quickly. Meanwhile, Amy and Terry offer to help Gina prepare for a big test.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Yippie Kayak
programme.desc: Jake, Charles and Gina are involved in a real-life 'Die Hard' situation while off-duty on Christmas Eve, and Terry must leave his family celebration to try to save his squad. Meanwhile, Amy tries to prove she’s just as tough as Holt and Rosa.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Hostage Situation
programme.desc: Charles and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife, Eleanor, steamrolls their plans. Meanwhile, Amy asks Terry to write a recommendation letter with disastrous results.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: 9 Days
programme.desc: When Captain Holt and Jake accidentally contract the mumps during an investigation, they decide to be quarantined together in hopes of still solving the case. Meanwhile, Rosa tries to help Boyle through a mourning process.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Cruise
programme.desc: Jake and Amy are excited to go on their first real vacation together, but Amy's perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover an old adversary is on board with them.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Where's the Beefcake
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tries to take nudity out of the annual Firefighters' Beefcake Calendar and the crew must get creative to maintain the integrity of its sexy (and oily) tradition.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi
programme.desc: The police captain catches Eddie sleeping with his wife before the Tacoma charity boxing match and challenges him to be the main event.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: The Bees and the Bees
programme.desc: Matteo Lane wants to talk about the bees and the bees, JP McDade does a killer Trump impression, and Tone Bell has a specific organ to donate.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout
programme.desc: Three comics enter into a battle of high stakes comedic one-upmanship.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Funny Joints
programme.desc: Gina Yashere knows about black people who listen to country music, Kevin McCaffrey reacts to his pics, and Julian McCullough pays Kevin a potato-themed insult.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Grandfathers of Anarchy
programme.desc: Noah Gardenswartz knows what a drug dealer shouldn't say, Gina Yashere talks juice cleanses, and Matteo Lane has an Easter bunny he'd swipe right for.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Churnt Up
programme.desc: Find out what food Clayton English describes as 'edible gentrification,' what Julian McCullough thinks you shouldn't say when you're Amish, and what Jessimae Peluso steals from an audience member.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: A Glittery Shoe
programme.desc: Sean Patton, Casey James Salengo, and Mehran Khaghani perform.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performer 11
programme.desc: A rapper whose balance is worse than his rhymes, a flaming embarrassment of a TV chef, a dancer who lost her sexy a long time ago and a weather man with serious arachnophobia.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 12
programme.desc: Butter-fingered figure-skaters, busted-ass break dancers, klutzy beauty pageant contestants and comedians who are only funny because they're so not funny.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 15
programme.desc: Featuring twenty of the most talent less performers yet. Performances include a man in a toast topping to a death scene that takes too long to die.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Malls
programme.desc: Adam and Emily go on a shopping spree of knowledge, where he illustrates that malls were created as tax loopholes for greedy developers and are now crumbling under their own weight.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art
programme.desc: Adam poses the question of what makes great art and shows why pieces visible to the masses are revered, regardless of artistic merit. He exposes the masters as copycats, and reveals that today's art market is a moneymaking scheme.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Emily Ruins Adam
programme.desc: Emily takes over to ruin Adam, debunking IQ tests and pointing out information Adam has gotten wrong in the past. Plus, she explains the backfire effect.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Out of Control
programme.desc: Find out how Michael makes himself sound like an expert, what he loves collecting and how the magic team surprised the rest of the crew.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Take the Mirror
programme.desc: Find out what happened when a scorpion got loose during magic rehearsal, what money truck sent the crew scrambling and what fruity trick had a British influence.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Top Priority of NASA
programme.desc: Find out what left a foul smell in our production office, how Michael met one of his current magic team members, and why Michael pretends to be hard of hearing. Plus, we have unaired footage.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Problem With Chocolate Turtles and Seeds
programme.desc: Find out what trick required the camera operator to hide inside a box for the entire day and how the show got its name.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd
programme.desc: Todd is hurt when he offers help to all his kids but no one needs it, until Savannah is hit with appendicitis.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: College Bootcamp
programme.desc: When Chase pays a stranger to change his flat tire, Todd and Julie realize that they have sheltered their kids, and only have a few months left to teach them the basics of life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: Kourtney and Scott approach the family for parenting advice, but some unwelcome input from Corey leads to a blowout argument between him and Scott. Khloe plans a wine-tasting trip to Napa to see how Kylie is handling significant life changes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 1
programme.desc: Khloe invites her ex to True's first birthday party, but an uncomfortable confrontation in front of family and friends leaves her questioning her decision.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Birthdays and Bad News Part 2
programme.desc: After an uncomfortable confrontation with her ex at True's first birthday, Khloe must figure out how to coexist with her ex for her daughter's sake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cruel and Unusual Punishment

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Commons
programme.desc: Leslie makes a public appeal for park design suggestions, but becomes suspicious when the best design comes from an architect in Eagleton. Meanwhile, Tom enlists the help of the office as he sets up his 'Rent-a-Swag' business.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Diane
programme.desc: Ron, Diane and Leslie attend a wood working awards dinner after Ron receives a nomination.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Two Parties
programme.desc: Ann throws a bachelorette party for Leslie and Chris throws a game night at Ben's.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Women in Garbage
programme.desc: In order to get more women in government, Leslie and April handle a garbage route. Tom learns about basketball from Andy and Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ann's Decision
programme.desc: After several unsuccessful relationships Ann makes a dramatic life decision. Ben enlists the help of Chris, Tom and Ron to choose a caterer for the wedding.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Emergency Response
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city wide emergency response drill is called.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After managing to escape the lethal Hunger Games arena not once but twice, Katniss Everdeen shelters in the hidden District 13 while the people she love remain under threat from the Capitol. With the help of her friends, she prepares to save Peeta.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: The story comes to a close as Katniss and the unit from District 13 prepare to take down President Snow once and for all. With the nation in a full-scale war, Katniss will be tested as never before as she fights for the very future of Panem.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Family, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads to places where families rule, including a Hawaiian Thai spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Done Right
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into food made the right way, including clam cakes and cheesefries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' In Cuba
programme.desc: Guy's on an international journey cruising the food scene in Cuba. First, an homage to Cuba's most famous chef, cookin' up his trademark coffee lobster and a regional pork plate.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Havana Hot Spots
programme.desc: Guy hits up the hot spots in Havana, Cuba. A neighborhood joint cooks up house-cured lamb and freshly-caught snapper. A house-turned-restaurant dishes out savory goat stew and Chinese fried rice.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something Sweet
programme.desc: It's Diners, Drive-Ins, Dives and decadence with plenty of sweet to go along with the savory. First up, Guy Fieri's in Kansas City, Mo., where a brunch spot is serving up a vegan treat rich enough for any meat eater.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Big Burgers To Little Italy
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from the bomb burgers to a taste of Italy. In Little Rock, Ark., a funky joint pairing their craft brews with all kinds of on-the-bun creations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen
programme.desc: Guy hits the road to grab grub straight from mom's kitchen. In Boulder, a mother and son team serve Chinese specialties, a Jamaican joint dishes out island favourites in Columbus and a Phoenix family spot cooks Latin cuisine.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Sneak Peek

programme.desc: Captain Sandy and her crew relive the best and worst moments from three seasons sailing the Mediterranean. They recall unforgettable crews, over-the-top guests and the real action down below.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Docked and Loaded
programme.desc: Captain Sandy continues her on-going battle with Sirocco's anchors, while Joao and Travis continue their deep dive to set the anchors free. Baseball star Johnny Damon and his family and friends deal with bad weather and a feisty yacht owner.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Monte Car-loco
programme.desc: The crew enjoys a day off at an exclusive resort in Monte Carlo, but some of them are faced with more than they bargained for. Joao and Hannah have a heart to heart, while June tries to open herself up to Hannah with not so favourable results.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry for Me, Sirocco
programme.desc: Captain Sandy finds one of the crew member's positions redundant. Joao finally confronts Jack on his lack of work ethic giving him an ultimatum. An overwhelmed Anastasia is pushed to her breaking point in the galley. Then, Colin makes a bold move.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's Ben a Long Time
programme.desc: Colin faces a tough decision and Anastasia accepts her new role, but Sandy wonders if she's now phoning her job in. An all-female group come on board and do their best to flirt with the deck crew. Jack and Aesha move in together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Nauti Girls Need Love Too
programme.desc: Ben's first dinner doesn’t wow the guests as much as he had hoped leaving him questioning if he still has his sea legs. Anastasia has a hard time adjusting back to her old third stew role.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Holy Ship!
programme.desc: Ben is determined to regain his sea legs, but Sirocco's faulty galley has other plans. Travis' latest drunken night has Sandy at the end of her rope. Jack ups his romance game by writing poetry for Aesha.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine
programme.desc: The charter guests request a White Party for their final dinner, and Ben goes to great lengths in creating a menu for the theme. Joao's ego gets him in hot water with Captain Sandy, while Jack enlists the crew to help him ask Aesha to be his girlfriend.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Love, Love Me Stew
programme.desc: The crew prepares for the final chapter of the season, and with Joao sidelined with a fever, Travis is forced to step up. Bad weather rolls into the south of France leaving Sirocco stuck at the dock, adding more pressure on the interior team to perform.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder in Broad Daylight

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled Web
programme.desc: Sam and Danielle Dreher appeared to have a storybook marriage but this ending was not happily ever after. When Sam was murdered, investigators discovered a twisted tale of secrets, lies and infidelity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Twisted in Texas

programme.title: The Big House: Florida State at Raiford
programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: LA County Jail
programme.desc: Explore the LA County Jail, with 20,000 inmates and a roster that reads like a Who's Who.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Toy Gun
programme.desc: Rebecca Webster was the only female rookie in her Academy class. She knows that as a woman in a man's world, she's going to have to work twice as hard to prove herself. However, Rebecca's rush to do everything on her own just might backfire on her.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Step Up or Step Off
programme.desc: FTO Michael is concerned about a rookie's shyness who fails a simple, important test.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: There's a New FTO in Town
programme.desc: Police rookie Amy is asked to put on the lights and sirens of her patrol car and race 'code' to calls. Dennis loses evidence from a drug arrest and his patrol car and his former Naval Petty Office wonders if he has what it takes.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Class Begins
programme.desc: Rookie A.J. Cafaro sees his first dead body; Hugh Herndon decides to become a cop and leave his teaching career behind.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie Mark Monson doesn't like taking orders from his female boss; an overconfident marine who is now a cop responds to a 'shots fired' call.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Finding the Cop Voice
programme.desc: Rookie Dennis Cooper has a chance to use his cop voice, but will he?

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Let's Play Pirate
programme.desc: When Nikki Orvin fell in love and married Damon Bamberg she had no idea what a twisted family she was now a part of. Soon after giving birth to Damon's son, Nikki realized that she was not the only woman in her husband's life.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Breakfast for a Dead Man
programme.desc: A likeable and hard working father is found murdered and questions are raised about his family.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Rum Chaser/ Murder for Nothing
programme.desc: Darlene George and her 13-year-old son are the victims of a random home invasion robbery. But when police arrive, Darlene's husband, Winston George is found in the basement, hog-tied and strangled.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Amy Gellert?
programme.desc: Amy Gellert was just 21 when she interrupted an intruder holding he parents hostage in their Florida home. Startled by the headlights of her car, the man brutally stabbed her parents and then killed her. Her parents survived, but Amy never made it inside.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sophia's Secret
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox's relationship with her high-school boyfriend Adam Shigwadja had become so abusive that he had been arrested once for threatening her with a knife. But nothing the court could do to separate them worked...until all hell broke loose.

programme.title: Murder Board: The Scalp Hunter
programme.desc: People fishing in a London canal are horrified when they reel in an old gym bag containing a collection of dismembered human body parts. Police realize they have serial killer on their hands who may have been murdering women across Europe for years.

programme.title: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: An intruder finds his way into a home and takes hostages in the basement.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A married mother of three was found with a single gunshot wound to her head. Unknown was how she was shot, if it was suicide or murder. The coroner ruled it a suicide but a call from a source re-opened the case with the husband arrested.

programme.title: Murder Board: The Scalp Hunter
programme.desc: People fishing in a London canal are horrified when they reel in an old gym bag containing a collection of dismembered human body parts. Police realize they have serial killer on their hands who may have been murdering women across Europe for years.

programme.title: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: An intruder finds his way into a home and takes hostages in the basement.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A married mother of three was found with a single gunshot wound to her head. Unknown was how she was shot, if it was suicide or murder. The coroner ruled it a suicide but a call from a source re-opened the case with the husband arrested.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sophia's Secret
programme.desc: Sophia Putney-Wilcox's relationship with her high-school boyfriend Adam Shigwadja had become so abusive that he had been arrested once for threatening her with a knife. But nothing the court could do to separate them worked...until all hell broke loose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates a whirlwind romance and the accusation that Lamont Stephenson strangled his fiancé and her dog. Later, Callahan Walsh explores police claims that Gloria Schulze is a freeloading drunk driver who repeatedly cheats the legal system.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Stolen Life
programme.desc: John Walsh explores the case of youthful con man Edgardo Perez, who allegedly preyed on older men until it turned deadly. Then, Callahan Walsh travels to Boulder to talk to a child predator.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Killer Confession
programme.desc: When Lea Porter goes missing in Prison Valley her family turn detective to try and find her. Their investigation leads to a shocking discovery - the killer's true identity. As the killer evades arrest, Lea's brother devises a plan to make him confess.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: On March 21st 2011, a fire burned down a parsonage behind a church and a Pastor loses his wife. Once the fire had settled a fire marshal investigated the site and discovered that there was more to the story than an accidental fire.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Warning Signs
programme.desc: A Deputy reports a 1990 Dodge Intrepid pushed over an embankment just south of Gig Harbor, Washington. He investigates and discovers the dead body of missing Puyallup father, Randall Ferguson, in the trunk. He had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Letters in the Closet
programme.desc: Karla leaves her home one night and never returns. The next day, her husband calls the police to file a missing person report. When the police uncover a treasure trove of hidden secrets, they have to decide who is telling the truth and who is lying.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Devil You Know
programme.desc: 20-year-old Missy Grubaugh, a devout Christian, is saving herself for marriage. But Missy's innocent charms attract the wrong type of men… with deadly results.

programme.title: Betrayed: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon admits she's struggled to find someone to take care of her. That's why she returned to school and landed a lucrative job. Sadly, though, one of her men will end her life just as this new chapter begins.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Wear a Pink Shirt
programme.desc: Abraham Cavazos shot a man at a party and fled to Mexico, where multiple women supported him. Although he changed identities, locations and girlfriends, the authorities found him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Silence a Witness
programme.desc: An Oklahoma drug lord killed a man for revenge, and fled to Mexico to escape prosecution.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Copy Movies
programme.desc: A successful video pirate scams the film industry while partying with celebrities and hiding from the law.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Conquering the Sky
programme.desc: This episode exposes the myths about the Wright brothers' invention of the airplane and America's favorite missing person, Amelia Earhart.

programme.title: Wingshooting USA: Phun for Everyone
programme.desc: Gratitude is something we often overlook, but Dave Olsen at South Dakota's Pheasant Phun lodge gives us reason to reflect on what's really important in life. Enjoying the places, people, and incredible country we hunt in are high on Dave's list.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Experimental Soldiers
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the United States of America searches for a way to create a generation of 'Supersoldiers' who use telepathy to win battles. In the 1950s gangster Whitey Bulger volunteers for the CIA's LSD project known as MK-Ultra.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.desc: Gary and Jerry win a large house at auction but must split the house in half in order to take it on the road. As they renovate the larger house, they enlist Gary's girls to help renovate the smaller piece as a mother-in-law suite.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Divided Domicile
programme.desc: After cutting their house in half for the move, the Snow Sisters get creative putting the house back together and decide to add on in the middle of the two structures. They turn the home into the perfect country getaway for a family.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Shotgun Shanty Vs. Hayhurst Brothers' Garden District Digs
programme.desc: The Hayhurst brothers win a house at auction, but after the move, unseen rot under the house leaves them with only half of it.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Casey and Catrina's Tuscan Abode
programme.desc: Casey & Catrina get a good buy on a 2 bed 1 bath home in Denton, TX. Casey is anticipating an easy move and Catrina wants to build an addition to get more bedroom and bathroom space. Together they decide to draw on the house's original character.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Refreshing Modern Residence
programme.desc: Raf and Paige remodel a tiny two-bedroom house won at auction. Raf finds stainless steel cabinets in the kitchen and plans to repurpose them to be used in another part of the house.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Cozy Cottage vs. Gary's Girls' Architectural Abode
programme.desc: HD Snow calls on his family to renovate a couple of storage houses he has on his moving yard. Donna and Toni take one house while Gary's girls take the other as the friendly family competition begins. Both teams plan to reuse some of the homes' contents.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Paige and Raf's Americana Style Design
programme.desc: Paige and Raf renovate an old army barracks they won at an auction in Aledo, Texas. Military accents help to keep the original Americana spirit of the barracks as it is being transformed into a stylish and functional home.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Rustic English Re-tree-t
programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Treehouses IV
programme.desc: Join Pete Nelson on a journey to explore ingenious treehouse designs and engineering feats of builders the world over. At the end of his adventure, Pete embarks on his very own epic treehouse engineering repair.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nelson Family Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete gifts his daughter Emily, and Patrick, her boyfriend and an NTS carpenter, with the ultimate housewarming gift - a treehouse of their very own - by turning a piece of Nelson family history into a Moroccan marvel nested nearly 35 feet off the ground.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950 ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heather and immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tamara's Tudor Tutorial
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1927 Tudor by blowing out the existing small kitchen and outfitting it with a large island and eating nook. She transforms a bedroom into a dining room, but her hopes of refurbishing the deck begin to break apart.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Shower Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a behemoth 1927 Tudor house, but while she admires the home's original details, her dad discovers a problem. She uses a kitchenette to create a bar, revamps an uneven patio and enlarges the master bathroom.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes 'r' Us
programme.desc: Four imaginative bakers are going to have to unleash their inner child as they compete for the chance to serve their creations at a black tie awards gala for the Chicago Toy and Game Fair.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Celebrity: Medieval Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four celebrity bakers are about to get medieval, as Yvette Nicole Brown, Brooke Burke-Charvet, Carson Kressley and Vanessa Marano battle to prove that their cupcakes reign supreme.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Celebrity: Matilda
programme.desc: Drake Bell, Lori Greiner, Bob Harper and Heather Morris battle to prove their celebrity cupcake dominance and create show-stopping cupcakes for a party celebrating the wonder and whimsy of Roald Dahl's classic story, Matilda.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Sweet Screams

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: The Candyman Cometh
programme.desc: The four remaining bakers make desserts to taste like their favorite candy bars and face death by chocolate with a dessert that combines chocolate with odd ingredients.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes

programme.desc: It's sugar and spice and everything nice as host Alfonso Ribeiro shows how Sriracha hot sauce and Tina's Chimichangas amp up the spice factor in their tasty treats.
