programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro gets the lowdown on the sweet messages imprinted on Necco's classic Sweet Hearts and how the Perfect Bite packs so much flavor into their Caramelized Onion and Feta Pastry Kisses.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Little Bits
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores little treats with big flavor like the colorful Carousel gumballs at Ford Gum, Ghirardelli Chocolate's decadent semi-sweet Baking Chips and the tasty Duchess Gem Donuts from Carolina Foods.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Sandwiches, Street Food and Cobbler a la Mode
programme.desc: Brad Miller heads to Portland, Ore., to visit Chef Melissa McMillan at her Pastrami Zombie food truck. She shows Brad how to make the truck's namesake sandwich, and he also tries the Cubby Cubano, a twist on the classic Cubano sandwich.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Biscuit Sandwiches, Smoked Wings and Sweet Hand Pies
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Atlanta, Georgia, where he finds the Deep South Biscuit Co. truck delivering fried chicken biscuit with bourbon-bacon jam and a brisket biscuit sandwich with cherry cola barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Michael McKean makes everyone's birthday wishes come true as he celebrates the best holiday of the year. He discovers that birthday cake was born during a revolution and that a bowl of Chinese noodles can bring you more birthdays to celebrate.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Game Night
programme.desc: Michael McKean goes into the wild to hunt for juicy game meat myths and fresh fish fibs. He calls foul on duck a l'orange with its so-called French origins and throws a line at wicked tuna to find out how we got hooked on tuna melts.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Wicked Good
programme.desc: Michael McKean celebrates Halloween by investigating dishes that are so good they're downright wicked! He's uncovering rhubarb pie's paranormal proclivities and does a background check on ramen with its racy rap sheet.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Baked Goodies
programme.desc: Michael McKean throws the carb-free diet out the window and uncovers the stories behind our favorite baked goodies. He starts by revealing that cupcakes are edible equations and explaining how the whoopie pie nearly caused a civil war.

programme.title: Good Eats: There Will Be Oil
programme.desc: Alton looks at edible oils that offer a wide range of flavours.

programme.title: Good Eats: Water Works
programme.desc: Chef Alton Brown heads upstream in search of the world's most important ingredient.

programme.title: Good Eats: Water Works II
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown takes an in-depth look at water.

programme.title: Good Eats: Yogurt: Good Milk Gone Bad
programme.desc: Yogurt cheese; herb spread; Thousand Island dressing; tarragon yogurt sauce; fresh yogurt.

programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.desc: Will Cain gives you his unfiltered take on the biggest stories in the sports world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wish Boned
programme.desc: Doug is ecstatic when he wins two tickets to the NCAA Final Four basketball tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Van Go
programme.desc: Holly discovers that Carrie used her for her van; Doug argues with a feisty waitress.

programme.title: Full House: Slumber Party
programme.desc: A mother/ daughter slumber party leaves Stephanie feeling left out until Joey rescues her.

programme.title: Full House: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: D.J.'s duties as editor of the school newspaper cause a rift in her friendship with Kim.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Hybrid Horror!
programme.desc: A terrified hybrid dinosaur rampages through the park, causing chaos and creating cover for Danny and Sinjin as they try to steal the Nedry videotape.

programme.title: 44 Cats: All Meow for Ice Cream/ Meatball's Lucky Day
programme.desc: It's a hot day and Cream, the ice cream maker cat's machine, isn't working. Then, it's Meatball's lucky day and he challenges Neko to a game of chance.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Tools of the Betrayed
programme.desc: An innocent lie leads to a break in trust between the Power Rangers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mimic Madness/ House Worming
programme.desc: When worms move in to SpongeBob's holes, it's up to him to hide his disgusting new friends from everyone else.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Grill Is Gone/ the Night Patty
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back. SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Grill is Gone/ The Night Patty
Middle School Moguls: Mogul on a Mission
programme.desc: At the Boss Ball, the culmination of everything the girls have worked for over the school year has each girl hoping she can win the coveted Mogie, a trophy honoring the best moguls.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. SpongeBob spills a milkshake during a delivery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pineapple Invasion/ Idiot Sauce
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret formula in his home, it's up to Gary to protect it from Plankton. When a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick, Sandy must save the day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car. Patrick thinks he is an old man, so SpongeBob reminds him how much fun it is to be a kid.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cuddle E. Hugs/ Pat the Horse
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him. Patrick wants to be a horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Goofy Newbie/ Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Patrick takes a job at the Goofy Goober when he learns the employees get free ice cream. Squidward gleefully switches jobs with a bus driver.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton Retires/ Trident Trouble
programme.desc: Plankton closes the Chum Bucket and moves to a new town, but Mr. Krabs suspects he's still up to no good.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House: Overnight Success/ Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Lincoln invites Clyde to a sleepover, but gets jealous when Clyde wants to hang out with his sisters. After eavesdropping on his parents, Lincoln thinks they have decided to get rid of their kids.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Worldwide Weather Wipeouts
programme.desc: Lakes are boiled and frogs frozen alive. Plagues of locusts rain down and snow buries a city. Explore global weather wipeouts from Maryland to the Middle East.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Fireballs from Space
programme.desc: Meteor shock, armies of snow monsters, blood red falls and tumbleweed invasions are all captured on video, examined and explained.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Ice Tsunami
programme.desc: A creeping blob of ice targets a resort town, popcorn snow falls in Kansas and mysterious, ghostly clouds are linked to space dust.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Bear County Crash
programme.desc: Veteran pilot Dave Akers and his friend, Gary Nall, enjoy a leisurely afternoon flying over the Knik Glacier in Southern Alaska. But as they head back to the airfield, they are pulled into a downdraft and crash land in remote wilderness.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Come Rain or Cyclone
programme.desc: Water is a necessity of life but in certain forms, it can threaten it. From surviving a monster typhoon in India, completing a record-breaking free dive to a horrifying plunge into a sinkhole, we are always at the mercy of water.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Tunnel Creek Avalanche
programme.desc: A group of 16 elite skiers and snowboarders on a back-country adventure in Washington state hear a 25-foot-high wall of snow thundering toward them.

programme.title: Water: The Ultimate Force
programme.desc: It's the most powerful and insidious force on the planet. How can something so vital be so dangerous? From hurricane storm surges to raging floods, we illustrate the science behind the power of water. Hear incredible stories of survival and flood safety.

programme.title: Top Ten Extreme Adventures
programme.desc: Adventurers willingly take on the harsh conditions of Mother Nature. From trekking through freezing tempters to biking through a desert, here are the top ten weather challenges.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Destinations
programme.desc: From extreme heat, to bone chilling cold, every year millions of us set out on a weather watching adventure. If you love weather like we do, these are the top ten must-see destinations for your travel bucket list.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Quakes and Mountain Lions
programme.desc: Do you know how to survive a bone-jarring earthquake or escape a deadly ocean whirlpool? Intense, caught-on-camera video pits you against deadly power outages and hungry mountain lions!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Earthquakes and Blizzards
programme.desc: Video footage of deadly lightning, wicked winds and high-tides are featured. Also, what to do when forced to give birth in a blinding blizzard and how to survive a seismic shocker from 55 stories in the air.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Rip Currents and Lightning
programme.desc: What would you do if a volcano erupts in front of you? How would you survive a deadly rip current? Harrowing caught-on-camera video pits you against broken water mains, deadly lightning, dangerous hot air balloon crashes, and giant tsunamis!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Snake Bites and Quicksand
programme.desc: Examining the possibilities of surviving an encounter with quicksand, as well as what to do if bitten by a rattlesnake. Also featuring footage of giant hurricanes, capsized boats and much more.

programme.title: AMHQ Weekend
programme.desc: The science and stories of weather, plus in-depth forecasts with a focus on weekend weather.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge
programme.desc: The latest news and weather to prepare for the weekend.

programme.title: Storms in 3D
programme.desc: Hurricanes and tornadoes - the most powerful storms on the planet. Now, we're creating and dissecting them right in our studios with augmented reality. Thanks to computer-generated technology, we're taking you right into the heart of these storms.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Swamped in the Amazon
programme.desc: Yossi Ghinsberg and his friend Kevin Gale are deep in the Bolivian Amazon when they encounter extremely dangerous rapids and an unforeseen waterfall.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Delirious in the Desert
programme.desc: Just a few hours into bouldering in Joshua Tree Park, Paul Hanks slips and falls about 20 feet, shattering his left heel and fracturing his pelvis. Disoriented and unable to walk, he falls a second time and fractures his skull.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Buried by a Blizzard
programme.desc: A long distance commute for Paula Lane and her boyfriend Rod Clifton takes a deadly turn when their Jeep gets stuck on a closed mountain road.

programme.title: Hoarders: Tra/ Jill
programme.desc: Tra, a 40-year-old firefighter, lives in chaos, surrounded by wall-to-wall hoarded possessions. Jill and her children live in a house filled with dusty boxes and black mould in the basement.

programme.title: Hoarders: Michelle/ Kim
programme.desc: Michelle's house is filled with 60 birds and mountains of clutter. Her husband won't return until the mess is cleaned up. Kim is a sales rep who can't keep organized or find anything amongst her clutter.

programme.title: Hoarders: Tami/ George
programme.desc: Tami is battling cancer but her extreme hoarding is getting in the way of her recuperation. George's hoarding has strained his relationships with his wife, daughters, and siblings.

programme.title: Hoarders: Adella/ Teri
programme.desc: Adella's children try one last time to help their mother fight her hoarding. Teri's hoarding caused her doctor to call Child Protective Services to help her children.

programme.title: Psychic Kids: Make the Spirits Stay
programme.desc: A12-year-old girl from Taveres, Florida finds comfort from the dark spirits that she inadvertently invited into her life. A girl's science-based parents are desperate to make sense of the spirits that are stalking their daughter.

programme.title: Psychic Kids: Ghost Sick
programme.desc: Psychic Alex Curcio must help an 11-year-old California girl find the courage to speak up against the spirits that are running around her home. Meanwhile, in northern Utah, Nick Barger meets a sick 13-year-old boy.

programme.title: Psychic Kids: Living with Evil
programme.desc: Mentor Peri Zarrella visits a 13-year-old girl in Columbus, Ohio who has a disturbing entity living in her home and haunting the entire family. Peri believes this evil spirit is not only attached to the girl, but dangers to others, including herself.

programme.title: Movie: Patriots Day
programme.desc: The newly promoted Police Sergeant works the day of the Boston Marathon. He joins a dedicated group of people, from investigators to nurses, who race against time to catch the bombers and heal the city. He sees hope as the whole city comes together.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Movie: The Game Plan
programme.desc: A quarterback's perfect bachelor lifestyle is put on hold when he discovers he has an 8-year-old daughter. The two form a bond over ballet and she eventually helps him clean up his image and discover his thoughtful and loving paternal instincts.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: The Anti-protest Protest
programme.desc: The always funny Chaunte Wayans is back to reminisce about an old love, and Dave Helem has a run-in with the anti-gluten brigade. Plus, Pretty Ricki's daughter is spilling tea on the entire congregation.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Pizza Panties
programme.desc: Vanessa Gonzalez gets hot and heavy over pizza, Rita Brent meets a six-year-old with more than just an old soul, and Gina Yashere comes face to face with a Jamaican pick-up artist. Plus, Orlando Leyba exposes a big scam at the gym.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Losing My Religion
programme.desc: Correy Bell makes tumbling down the stairs look sexy, and Dave Helem has a message for substitute teachers. Plus, Pretty Ricki puts the 'C'' in crazy' and Dave Temple has a church experience he'll never forget.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stage Five Clinger
programme.desc: Comedian Rita Brent reveals her number one tip for going number two at work, Kyle Erby thinks black folks should stick together, sometimes, and Vanessa Fraction gets an early sex-ed lesson. Plus, Owen Smith moves to LA to ditch a clinger.

programme.title: Fameless: Through the Cooking Glass
programme.desc: An aspiring art expert gets 'framed,' a product tester learns a lesson in the kitchen, and a wannabe relationship expert loses a babe in the woods.

programme.title: Fameless: Holiday Special
programme.desc: A wannabe game show host and his contestant have an unfortunate run in with Santa Claus. A helpful elf tries to find out if a hospital should be on the naughty or nice list. An aspiring host crashes a holiday event.

programme.title: Fameless: Ear Factor
programme.desc: A wannabe host pitches a product that sounds way too good to be true, an aspiring crime fighter runs out of gas during a sting operation, and a drill sergeant bombs his one chance at stardom.

programme.title: Fameless: Host Buster
programme.desc: A wannabe TV star finds a crack in a new dental product, an aspiring host takes a swing at stardom, and a would-be hotel critic doesn't have a ghost of a chance.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Inventions 8
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11
programme.desc: Twenty more inventions including a way to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and a sound system for the great beyond.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 12
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the smartest inventions ever to hit the market. There's a flask for your butt, a way to re-shape meat, and the last doughnut security system you'll ever need.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 13
programme.desc: These inventions could put Thomas Edison to shame, from a bird feeder with a shocking high-voltage surprise, to a bowl made entirely of bacon and a wacky way to grow bananas at home.

programme.title: Movie: The Game Plan
programme.desc: A quarterback's perfect bachelor lifestyle is put on hold when he discovers he has an 8-year-old daughter. The two form a bond over ballet and she eventually helps him clean up his image and discover his thoughtful and loving paternal instincts.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: It's a Chicken, Sir

programme.desc: Harry Potter and Dumbledore embark on a dangerous journey to defeat Harry's evil enemy, Voldemort. Meanwhile, the rest of the gang probe into the identity of the mysterious Half-Blood Prince.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: Million Dollar Arm
programme.desc: A sports agent travels to India in the hopes of finding a talented young cricket pitcher that he can turn into a baseball star. He returns to the States with two 18-year-old boys who have incredible throwing arms, yet no idea how to play baseball.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1
programme.desc: After managing to escape the lethal Hunger Games arena not once but twice, Katniss Everdeen shelters in the hidden District 13 while the people she love remain under threat from the Capitol. With the help of her friends, she prepares to save Peeta.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
programme.desc: The story comes to a close as Katniss and the unit from District 13 prepare to take down President Snow once and for all. With the nation in a full-scale war, Katniss will be tested as never before as she fights for the very future of Panem.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Touchdown!
programme.desc: Valerie kicks off football season with white chicken chili and toppings bar, a football cheese ball with herbed crackers, green salad with champagne vinaigrette, toffee buckeyes and a bloody bull cocktail with a spicy pickled okra and green bean garnish.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Voodoo That I Do Do

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Anteaters. They're Just Crazy-Lookin

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dum Diddy Dum Diddy Doo

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: City of Great Racks
programme.desc: Charlie gets closer to consummating his relationship with Linda, but then he begins to see Rose's face everywhere he turns.

programme.desc: Charlie encounters an ex-girlfriend whose son looks an awful lot like him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Devil's Lube

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: She'll Still Be Dead at Halftime

programme.desc: Charlie must decide between his fiancée, Chelsea, and his old flame, Mia.

programme.desc: Charlie has trouble adjusting to dating a woman who is slightly older than him.

programme.desc: Charlie's past comes back to bite him when his girlfriend decides that his stalker, Rose, is just too much to handle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Hookers and a Philly Cheesesteak
programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Darn Priest

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring

programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Home Again, Rose

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Blanche has a date and tries to dump her visiting uncle Lucas on Dorothy. Later, to get revenge, Dorothy and Lucas play a trick on Blanche by telling her they're getting married. Rose announces she plans on moving, Lucas decides to reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One Flew Out of the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Dorothy accepts Lucas's marriage proposal and they wed. Blanche, Rose, and Dorothy say a tearful goodbye with Dorothy planning on moving to Atlanta. Meanwhile, Sophia makes a final decision on where she wants to live.

programme.desc: Blanche announces that Harry has proposed leaving Rose worried about where she will live.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego - California Tales: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Cooking for 7,000

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Llama Drama
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne is tasked at removing a six-pound mass from a small dog, Dr. Blue and wife welcome their first daughter to the family. The vets make a house call to a llama that's causing some drama. Dr. Ross extracts a whopping 14 teeth from a mini poodle.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Get a first look at the series. The Irwins work thoughtfully and tirelessly to carry on Steve's mission to bring people closer to animals and ignite the connection that will ensure an abundance of wildlife for generations to come.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Bonus Tails: A Tale of Two Tails
programme.desc: Dr. Blue has a crisis on his hands with a dog that has chewed off her own tail, while Dr. Ross treats a reptile that might need a tail amputation. Dr. Lavigne helps Sutter Butter, a cat rescued from being thrown out of a car, and is now having seizures.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Face of Danger
programme.desc: The game warden's marine team searches a foreign cargo vessel in the Gulf of Mexico. A man is suspected of poaching 15 deer out of season and the game wardens discover a large marijuana growing operation outside of Dallas.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stray Bullets
programme.desc: In El Paso County, teal season has just begun. An injured hog needs help in Hardin County. Galveston County fishermen are not playing by the rules. A suspicious driver is searched in Chambers County. Turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back in the Wild
programme.desc: Anglers are out all over Texas. In Houston County, a Game Warden returns after a life-threatening injury. Along the coast, fishermen get caught with too many sharks. A protected turtle gets relocated and anglers on the Gulf learn how to tag fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks and Bows
programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Owl Gone Bad
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas. On the Gulf, Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps. An owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wildcat Garage
programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas. In East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer. On the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas game wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water. Hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property. The game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire

programme.title: Dateline: The Wire
programme.desc: A young nurse was murdered in her small studio apartment with only a broken necklace and an unusual weapon found as evidence. Twenty years after the case went cold, a determined detective attempts to crack it.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Killer Confession

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
